title: Structured operational datasets (Action Groups)
author: PITER AiOps
body:
Structured operational data is stored once under data/source/ and read by Bedrock Action Groups (not duplicated in this knowledge base).

- deploys.csv -> piter-recent-deployments
- service_owners.csv, business_impact.json -> piter-service-context
- past_incidents.csv -> piter-similar-incidents
- escalation_policies.json, priority_matrix.json -> piter-escalation

Use Action Groups for numeric scores, owners, and historical rows. Use KB JSON runbooks and service guides for procedural remediation text.

Safety: never expose real phone numbers or personal email addresses in chat output. Use safe preview fields (on-call role names, PagerDuty schedule IDs) only.
